zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Sutton於1315年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾霍爾德內斯時，他的父親Sir John de Sutton 1st Lord Sutton of Holderness45歲，母親Constance Sampson42歲。他於1349年與Agnes de Hotham在英國英格蘭越可爾霍爾德內斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他在英國英格蘭越可爾被列為high sheriff 。他去世於1394年之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Sutton于1315年出生在英国英格兰越可爾霍爾德內斯时，他的父亲Sir John de Sutton 1st Lord Sutton of Holderness45岁，母亲Constance Sampson42岁。他于1349年与Agnes de Hotham在英国英格兰越可爾霍爾德內斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他在英国英格兰越可爾被列为high sheriff 。他去世于1394年之前。

nameMeanings.name: Sutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Sutton, named with Old English sūth ‘south, southern’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The English surname is also common in Ireland (Wexford, Kildare), where it has been established since the 13th century and Gaelicized as de Sutún.
Jewish (from the former Ottoman Empire, including Syria): unexplained.
English: topographic name from Middle English (bi) suthentune ‘(at the place to the) south of the village’.

variants.name: Setton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avi, Ronit, Yossef.  French Andree, Henri, Jacques, Maryse.
Jewish (from the Ottoman Empire): altered form of   Sutton  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Sutton was born in 1315, in Holderness, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John de Sutton 1st Lord Sutton of Holderness, was 45 and his mother, Constance Sampson, was 42. He married Agnes de Hotham in 1349, in Holderness, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. His occupation is listed as high sheriff  in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. He died before 1394.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Sutton est né en 1315, à Holderness, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John de Sutton 1st Lord Sutton of Holderness, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Constance Sampson, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Hotham en 1349, à Holderness, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff  à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé avant 1394.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Sutton 1315 in Holderness, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de Sutton 1st Lord Sutton of Holderness 45 und seine Mutter Constance Sampson 42. Er hat 1349 in Holderness, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Agnes de Hotham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als high sheriff  in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb vor 1394.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Sutton è nato il nel 1315 nel Holderness, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John de Sutton 1st Lord Sutton of Holderness, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Constance Sampson, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de Hotham nel 1349, nel Holderness, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff  nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì prima del 1394.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Suttonが1315年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアホールデルネスで生まれた時，父Sir John de Sutton 1st Lord Sutton of Holdernessは45歳，母Constance Sampsonは42歳であった。1349年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアホールデルネスでAgnes de Hothamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでの職業はhigh sheriff と記録されている。彼は1394年以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Sutton(이)가 1315년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 홀더네스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Sutton 1st Lord Sutton of Holderness(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Constance Sampson(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1349년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 홀더네스에서 Agnes de Hotham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 high sheriff 이었다. 그는 1394년 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Sutton nasceu em 1315, em Holderness, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John de Sutton 1st Lord Sutton of Holderness, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Constance Sampson, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Hotham em 1349, em Holderness, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como high sheriff  em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu antes 1394.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Sutton родился в 1315 г. в местности холдирнесс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John de Sutton 1st Lord Sutton of Holderness было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Constance Sampson, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Hotham в 1349 г. в местности холдирнесс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери.  Он работал по профессии high sheriff  в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер перед 1394 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Sutton nació en 1315, en Holderness, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John de Sutton 1st Lord Sutton of Holderness, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Constance Sampson, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Agnes de Hotham en 1349, en Holderness, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era high sheriff  en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió antes de 1394.
